title: Flamefrags Wolf Cannon
description:
Orbital Wolf Cannon like Flamefrags wolf summoning powers on the Unstable SMP, or like Wemmbu's Orbital Strike Cannon but for wolves!

Use it with /owc give
Change how many it spawns with /owc set
body:
# **Orbital Wolf Cannon (OWC)**

Orbital Wolf Cannon is a powerful utility mod for Minecraft, which grants server operators the ability to summon an elite pack of protective wolves instantly.

## # 📥 Installation Guide

    Install Fabric Loader: OWC is built for the Fabric mod loader. We recommend using a modern launcher (like Prism or CurseForge) to install Fabric automatically.

    Download the Mod: Place the .jar file for OWC into your Minecraft mods folder.

    Launch the Game: Start Minecraft using your Fabric profile.

    Permissions: Ensure you have Operator (OP) status on your server or have "Cheats Enabled" in single-player, as this mod is restricted to admins only.

## 🎮 How to Use
**1. Get Your Cannon**

Open your chat and type:
/owc give
This will place the Orbital Wolf Cannon (a specialized golden fishing rod) into your inventory.
**2. Configure Your Pack**

By default, the cannon spawns 5 wolves. You can change this number (up to 50) by typing:
/owc set <amount>
Example: /owc set 10 will make your next strike spawn 10 wolves.
**3. Deploy the Pack**

Simply Right-Click while holding the Orbital Wolf Cannon. A pack of armored, high-speed wolves will be "beamed down" to the location you are looking at.
